response_text:
ENTITY Airport
PK airport_code
ATTR airport_code : varchar : PK
ATTR airport_name : varchar
ATTR city_code : varchar : FK

ENTITY City
PK city_code
ATTR city_code : varchar : PK
ATTR city_name : varchar

ENTITY Airline
PK airline_code
ATTR airline_code : varchar : PK
ATTR airline_name : varchar

ENTITY Airplane
PK registration
ATTR registration : varchar : PK
ATTR model : varchar

ENTITY Flight
PK flight_number
ATTR flight_number : varchar : PK
ATTR airline_code : varchar : FK
ATTR departure_airport : varchar : FK
ATTR arrival_airport : varchar : FK
ATTR scheduled_departure : date
ATTR scheduled_arrival : date

ENTITY FlightStatus
PK status_code
ATTR status_code : varchar : PK
ATTR status_description : varchar

ENTITY FlightStatusLog
PK log_id
ATTR flight_number : varchar : FK
ATTR status_code : varchar : FK
ATTR status_date : date
ATTR status_time : time

ENTITY CrewMember
PK crew_id
ATTR crew_id : varchar : PK
ATTR first_name : varchar
ATTR last_name : varchar
ATTR role : varchar

ENTITY CrewAssignment
PK flight_number, crew_id
ATTR flight_number : varchar : FK
ATTR crew_id : varchar : FK
ATTR role : varchar

ENTITY BaggageBelt
PK belt_code
ATTR belt_code : varchar : PK
ATTR airport_code : varchar : FK

ENTITY FlightBaggageBelt
PK flight_number
ATTR flight_number : varchar : PK : FK
ATTR belt_code : varchar : FK

REL Airport -> City : 1 -> 1..N : FK=city_code
REL Flight -> Airline : 1 -> 1 : FK=airline_code
REL Flight -> Airport : 1 -> 1 : FK=departure_airport
REL Flight -> Airport : 1 -> 1 : FK=arrival_airport
REL FlightStatusLog -> Flight : 1..N -> 1 : FK=flight_number
REL FlightStatusLog -> FlightStatus : 1..N -> 1 : FK=status_code
REL CrewAssignment -> Flight : 1..N -> 1 : FK=flight_number
REL CrewAssignment -> CrewMember : 1..N -> 1 : FK=crew_id
REL FlightBaggageBelt -> Flight : 1 -> 1 : FK=flight_number
REL FlightBaggageBelt -> BaggageBelt : 1 -> 0..1 : FK=belt_code
